sections.paragraph:
Original: קנה

Transliteration: qânâh

Phonetic: kaw-naw'

BDB Definition:

Kanah = "reed"
  1. a stream flowing into the Mediterranean Sea that marked the boundary between Ephraim on the south and Manasseh on the north
  2. a town marking the boundary of Asher

Origin: fem. of H7070

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
